timeSeriesQuery.timeSeriesQueryLanguage:
fetch cloud_run_revision::logging.googleapis.com/user/sjktconnect_api_egress_per_route
| align delta(1h)
| every 1h
| group_by [metric.route], sum(value)
| top 10

fetch cloud_run_revision::logging.googleapis.com/user/sjktconnect_web_egress_per_route
| align delta(1h)
| every 1h
| group_by [metric.route], sum(value)
| top 10

widget.title: API egress by User-Agent (bot detection, top 10)

timeSeriesQuery.timeSeriesQueryLanguage:
fetch cloud_run_revision::logging.googleapis.com/user/sjktconnect_api_egress_per_route
| align delta(1h)
| every 1h
| group_by [metric.user_agent], sum(value)
| top 10

widget.title: Web egress by User-Agent (bot detection, top 10)

timeSeriesQuery.timeSeriesQueryLanguage:
fetch cloud_run_revision::logging.googleapis.com/user/sjktconnect_web_egress_per_route
| align delta(1h)
| every 1h
| group_by [metric.user_agent], sum(value)
| top 10
